1→package com.multilanglearner.data.network

    16→/**
    17→ * 视频下载服务 - 使用在线 API 解析视频
    18→ * 支持多平台：B站、抖音、YouTube、TikTok 等
    19→ *
    20→ * 改进点：
    21→ * - 参考 Electron 版本的平台检测和视频提取逻辑
    22→ * - 改进 B站、抖音的解析逻辑，支持多种备用 API
    23→ * - 添加 YouTube 支持（使用 yt-dlp API 或备用方案）
    24→ * - 改进错误处理和重试机制
    25→ * - 添加详细的日志输出
    26→ * - 支持Cookie认证（解决403问题）
    27→ */
    28→class VideoDownloadService(
    29→    private val bilibiliCookieProvider: (() -> String?)? = null,
    30→    private val youtubeCookieProvider: (() -> String?)? = null,
    31→    private val douyinCookieProvider: (() -> String?)? = null,
    32→    private val tiktokCookieProvider: (() -> String?)? = null
    33→) {
    34→
    35→    companion object {
    36→        private const val TAG = "VideoDownloadService"
    37→        private const val DEFAULT_TIMEOUT = 30_000L
    38→        private const val MAX_RETRIES = 3
    39→        private const val RETRY_DELAY_MS = 1000L
    40→    }
    41→
    42→    /**
    43→     * 获取平台对应的Cookie
    44→     */
    45→    private fun getCookieForPlatform(url: String): String? {
    46→        return when {
    47→            url.contains("bilibili.com") || url.contains("b23.tv") -> bilibiliCookieProvider?.invoke()
    48→            url.contains("youtube.com") || url.contains("youtu.be") -> youtubeCookieProvider?.invoke()
    49→            url.contains("douyin.com") || url.contains("iesdouyin.com") -> douyinCookieProvider?.invoke()
    50→            url.contains("tiktok.com") -> tiktokCookieProvider?.invoke()

    54→
    55→    /**
    56→     * 检查指定URL是否需要Cookie认证
    57→     */
    58→    fun isCookieRequired(url: String): Boolean {
    59→        return when {
    60→            url.contains("bilibili.com") || url.contains("b23.tv") -> bilibiliCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    61→            url.contains("youtube.com") || url.contains("youtu.be") -> youtubeCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    62→            url.contains("douyin.com") || url.contains("iesdouyin.com") -> douyinCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    63→            url.contains("tiktok.com") -> tiktokCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    64→            else -> false
    65→        }
    66→    }
    67→
    68→    /**
    69→     * 检查是否已配置B站Cookie
    70→     */
    71→    fun hasBilibiliCookie(): Boolean {
    72→        return bilibiliCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    73→    }
    74→
    75→    /**
    76→     * 检查是否已配置YouTube Cookie
    77→     */
    78→    fun hasYouTubeCookie(): Boolean {
    79→        return youtubeCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    80→    }
    81→
    82→    /**
    83→     * 检查是否已配置抖音 Cookie
    84→     */
    85→    fun hasDouyinCookie(): Boolean {
    86→        return douyinCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    87→    }
    88→
    89→    /**
    90→     * 检查是否已配置TikTok Cookie
    91→     */
    92→    fun hasTiktokCookie(): Boolean {
    93→        return tiktokCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    94→    }
    95→
    96→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    97→        .connectTimeout(30, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    98→        .readTimeout(30, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    99→        .followRedirects(true)
   100→        .build()
   101→
   102→    /**
   103→     * 平台检测 - 参考 Electron 版本的 detectPlatform 函数
   104→     * 支持更多平台和短链接
   105→     */
   106→    fun detectPlatform(url: String): VideoPlatform {
   107→        val lowerUrl = url.lowercase()
   108→        return when {
   109→            // YouTube - 支持主域名和短链接
   110→            lowerUrl.contains("youtube.com") || lowerUrl.contains("youtu.be") -> VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE
   111→            // Bilibili - 支持主域名和 b23.tv 短链接
   112→            lowerUrl.contains("bilibili.com") || lowerUrl.contains("b23.tv") -> VideoPlatform.BILIBILI
   113→            // 抖音 - 支持多种域名
   114→            lowerUrl.contains("douyin.com") || lowerUrl.contains("iesdouyin.com") -> VideoPlatform.DOUYIN
   115→            // TikTok
   116→            lowerUrl.contains("tiktok.com") -> VideoPlatform.TIKTOK
   117→            // 微博
   118→            lowerUrl.contains("weibo.com") -> VideoPlatform.WEIBO
   119→            // 小红书
   120→            lowerUrl.contains("xiaohongshu.com") || lowerUrl.contains("xhslink.com") -> VideoPlatform.XIAOHONGSHU
   121→            // 直接视频链接
   122→            lowerUrl.contains(".mp4") || lowerUrl.contains(".m3u8") || lowerUrl.contains(".mpd") -> VideoPlatform.DIRECT
   123→            // 未知平台
   124→            else -> VideoPlatform.UNKNOWN
   125→        }
   126→    }
   127→
   128→    /**
   129→     * 获取视频下载链接 - 主入口函数
   130→     * 参考 Electron 版本的 extract-info IPC 处理
   131→     */
   132→    suspend fun getVideoInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   133→        withTimeout(DEFAULT_TIMEOUT) {
   134→            try {
   135→                val cleanUrl = cleanUrl(url)
   136→                Log.d(TAG, "Processing URL: $cleanUrl")

   384→    private fun extractBVID(url: String): String? {
   385→        val bvPattern = Regex("(BV[a-zA-Z0-9]{10})")

   393→    private fun extractYoutubeVideoId(url: String): String? {

   395→        val patterns = listOf(
   396→            Regex("(?:youtube\\.com/watch\\?v=|youtu\\.be/)([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})"),
   397→            Regex("youtube\\.com/embed/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})")
   398→        )
   399→
   400→        for (pattern in patterns) {
   401→            val match = pattern.find(url)
   402→            if (match != null) {

Web search results for query: "GitHub YouTube video extract download yt-dlp stars:>10000"

Web search error: undefined

## 搜索结果：GitHub YouTube 视频下载工具

### 🏆 首选推荐：yt-dlp

| 属性 | 详情 |
|------|------|
| **项目地址** | https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp |
| **Star 数** | ~137,000+ ⭐ |
| **Fork 数** | ~11,000+ |
| **开发语言** | Python |
| **系统支持** | Windows、macOS、Linux |

### 核心功能

1. **支持 1000+ 网站**
   - YouTube、B站、抖音、快手、优酷、腾讯视频、爱奇艺、小红书、TikTok、Twitter、Vimeo 等

2. **强大的下载能力**
   - 支持最高 4K/8K 画质下载
   - 可单独下载音频或字幕
   - 支持批量下载（播放列表、频道）

3. **特色功能**
   - 集成 SponsorBlock API（自动跳过赞助商片段）
   - 代理支持
   - Cookie 支持（可下载需要登录的视频）

### 基本使用示例

```bash
# 基本下载
yt-dlp "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=视频ID"

# 使用 cookie 下载需要登录的视频
yt-dlp --cookies cookies.txt "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=视频ID"

# 查看可用格式
yt-dlp --list-formats "https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV号"

# 指定画质下载并合并为 mp4
yt-dlp -f 'bv*[height=1080]+ba' --merge-output-format mp4 "视频URL"
```

### 安装方式

```bash
# 使用 pip
pip install yt-dlp

# 使用二进制文件直接运行
# 从 GitHub Releases 下载对应平台的可执行文件
```

### 备注

- yt-dlp 是已停止维护的 youtube-dlc/youtube-dl 的活跃分支
- 需要合并视频时需安装 FFmpeg
- 下载需要登录的视频时推荐使用 Cookie-Editor 浏览器插件

## 搜索结果：GitHub B站视频下载解析API项目

以下是搜索到的相关开源项目：

### 🔥 推荐项目

#### 1. **BilibiliDown** (热门推荐)
- **GitHub**: `github.com/nICEnnnnnnnLee/BilibiliDown`
- **Star数**: 高人气项目
- **主要功能**:
  - 批量下载收藏夹、UP主全部视频和合集
  - 支持断点续传
  - 同时保存视频、CC字幕和弹幕文件
  - 下载互动视频、课程视频和音频内容
  - 提供扫码、密码、短信多种登录方式
  - 支持 Windows、Linux、Mac 系统

#### 2. **bilibili-parse** (API解析工具)
- **项目地址**: `https://gitcode.com/gh_mirrors/bi/bilibili-parse`
- **核心功能**:
  - 简单易用的API接口
  - 支持JSON、URL、DPlayer三种输出格式
  - 支持多种清晰度选择 (16-127)
  - 环境要求：PHP 5.4+，Curl和OpenSSL扩展
  - 内置缓存机制和错误处理

#### 3. **Bilibili_video** (直链解析源码)
- **GitHub**: `github.com/Suxiaoqinx/Bilibili_video`
- **特点**:
  - 解析B站视频直链
  - 支持解析1080P视频（需要Cookie）
  - 支持 b23.tv、m.bilibili.com、www.bilibili.com

#### 4. **bilidown**
- **GitHub**: `github.com/iuroc/bilidown`
- **特点**:
  - 支持8K视频、Hi-Res音频、杜比视界下载
  - 批量解析
  - 可扫码登录
  - 常驻托盘

### 📌 使用建议

1. **开发集成**: 如果需要在网站/应用中集成B站视频功能，推荐 **bilibili-parse**
2. **批量下载**: 需要批量下载视频推荐 **BilibiliDown**
3. **简单解析**: 获取直链推荐 **Bilibili_video**

    25→            }
    26→        }
    27→    }
    28→}

content.content:
1→package com.multilanglearner.navigation
     2→
     3→import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
     4→import androidx.navigation.NavType
     5→import androidx.navigation.compose.NavHost
     6→import androidx.navigation.compose.composable
     7→import androidx.navigation.compose.rememberNavController
     8→import androidx.navigation.navArgument
     9→import com.multilanglearner.ui.home.HomeScreen
    10→import com.multilanglearner.ui.player.PlayerScreen
    11→import com.multilanglearner.ui.vocabulary.VocabularyScreen
    12→import com.multilanglearner.ui.regulation.RegulationScreen
    13→
    14→@Composable
    15→fun NavGraph() {
    16→    val navController = rememberNavController()
    17→
    18→    NavHost(navController = navController, startDestination = "home") {
    19→        composable("home") {
    20→            HomeScreen(
    21→                onNavigateToPlayer = { videoPath, subtitlePath ->
    22→                    val encodedVideo = java.net.URLEncoder.encode(videoPath, "UTF-8")
    23→                    val encodedSub = subtitlePath?.let { java.net.URLEncoder.encode(it, "UTF-8") } ?: ""
    24→                    navController.navigate("player/$encodedVideo?subtitle=$encodedSub")
    25→                },
    26→                onNavigateToVocabulary = { navController.navigate("vocabulary") },
    27→                onNavigateToRegulation = { navController.navigate("regulation") }
    28→            )
    29→        }
    30→        composable(
    31→            "player/{videoPath}?subtitle={subtitle}",
    32→            arguments = listOf(
    33→                navArgument("videoPath") { type = NavType.StringType },
    34→                navArgument("subtitle") { type = NavType.StringType; defaultValue = "" }
    35→            )
    36→        ) { backStackEntry ->
    37→            val videoPath = java.net.URLDecoder.decode(backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("videoPath") ?: "", "UTF-8")
    38→            val subtitlePath = java.net.URLDecoder.decode(backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("subtitle") ?: "", "UTF-8").ifBlank { null }
    39→            PlayerScreen(
    40→                videoPath = videoPath,
    41→                subtitlePath = subtitlePath,
    42→                onBack = { navController.popBackStack() }
    43→            )
    44→        }
    45→        composable("vocabulary") {

    36→
    37→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class, ExperimentalFoundationApi::class)
    38→@Composable
    39→fun HomeScreen(
    40→    onNavigateToPlayer: (String, String?) -> Unit,
    41→    onNavigateToVocabulary: () -> Unit,
    42→    onNavigateToRegulation: () -> Unit,
    43→    viewModel: HomeViewModel = hiltViewModel()
    44→) {
    45→    val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsState()
    46→    val clipboardManager = LocalClipboardManager.current
    47→    val context = LocalContext.current
    48→    var showAISettings by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
    49→    var showAssistant by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
    50→    var showThemeDialog by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
    51→    var showVideoDownloadSettings by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
    52→
    53→    // 视频列表类型切换：已下载 / 已转录
    54→    var videoListType by remember { mutableStateOf(0) } // 0 = 已下载, 1 = 已转录
    55→
    56→    // 转录服务广播接收器
    57→    val transcriptionQueueReceiver = remember {
    58→        object : BroadcastReceiver() {
    59→            override fun onReceive(context: Context?, intent: Intent?) {
    60→                when (intent?.action) {
    61→                    TranscriptionService.ACTION_PROGRESS -> {
    62→                        val message = intent.getStringExtra(TranscriptionService.EXTRA_MESSAGE) ?: ""
    63→                        val progress = intent.getIntExtra(TranscriptionService.EXTRA_PROGRESS, 0)
    64→                        // 从消息中提取当前转录的视频名称
    65→                        val currentVideo = message.substringBefore(")").trim()
    66→                        viewModel.updateTranscriptionQueue(currentVideo, uiState.transcriptionQueue, progress, message)
    67→                    }
    68→                    TranscriptionService.ACTION_QUEUE_UPDATE -> {
    69→                        val queueArray = intent.getStringArrayExtra(TranscriptionService.EXTRA_QUEUE_LIST)
    70→                        val queueList = queueArray?.toList() ?: emptyList()
    71→                        viewModel.updateTranscriptionQueue(uiState.transcribingVideo, queueList, uiState.transcriptionProgress, uiState.transcriptionMessage)
    72→                    }
    73→                    TranscriptionService.ACTION_COMPLETED -> {
    74→                        viewModel.transcriptionCompleted()
    75→                    }
    76→                }
    77→            }
    78→        }
    79→    }
    80→
    81→    // 注册和注销转录广播接收器
    82→    DisposableEffect(Unit) {
    83→        val progressFilter = IntentFilter(TranscriptionService.ACTION_PROGRESS)
    84→        val queueFilter = IntentFilter(TranscriptionService.ACTION_QUEUE_UPDATE)
    85→        val completedFilter = IntentFilter(TranscriptionService.ACTION_COMPLETED)
    86→        context.registerReceiver(transcriptionQueueReceiver, progressFilter)
    87→        context.registerReceiver(transcriptionQueueReceiver, queueFilter)
    88→        context.registerReceiver(transcriptionQueueReceiver, completedFilter)
    89→
    90→        onDispose {
    91→            context.unregisterReceiver(transcriptionQueueReceiver)
    92→        }
    93→    }
    94→
    95→    // 确认对话框状态
    96→    var showDeleteConfirm by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
    97→    var showLocationConfirm by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
    98→    var showShareConfirm by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
    99→    var selectedVideo by remember { mutableStateOf<VideoEntity?>(null) }
   100→

content.text:
基于我对代码的分析，现在我来详细总结这个 Android 项目的完整结构：

## D:/llapk Android 项目完整结构分析

### **项目概述**
这是一个多语言学习应用，主要功能包括：
1. **视频下载**：支持从多个平台（B站、YouTube、抖音、TikTok等）下载视频
2. **视频转录**：将视频音频转换为文字，支持带时间戳
3. **字幕生成**：生成 VTT 字幕文件
4. **翻译功能**：支持14种语言的翻译
5. **词汇学习**：生词本和学习功能

### **核心架构**

#### **1. 数据层（Data Layer）**
```
data/
├── network/          # 网络服务
│   ├── VideoDownloadService.kt      # 核心视频下载服务
│   ├── SegmentedDownloader.kt       # 分段下载器
│   ├── WhisperService.kt            # Whisper 转录服务
│   ├── SegmentedWhisperService.kt   # 分段 Whisper 服务
│   ├── FFmpegSegmentedTranscriptionService.kt # FFmpeg 分段转录
│   ├── VideoDownloadForegroundService.kt # 前台下载服务
│   ├── TranslateService.kt          # 翻译服务
│   ├── DictionaryService.kt        # 词典服务
│   └── AIService.kt                # AI服务
├── db/              # 数据库
│   ├── AppDatabase.kt               # 数据库配置
│   ├── dao/                         # 数据访问对象
│   │   ├── VideoDao.kt             # 视频数据访问
│   │   ├── FavoriteDao.kt          # 收藏词汇数据访问
│   │   └── RegulationDao.kt        # 规则数据访问
│   └── entity/                     # 实体类
│       ├── VideoEntity.kt          # 视频实体
│       ├── FavoriteWord.kt          # 收藏词汇实体
│       └── UserRegulation.kt      # 用户规则实体
├── repository/      # 仓库模式
│   ├── VideoRepository.kt          # 视频仓库
│   ├── FavoriteRepository.kt       # 收藏词汇仓库
│   └── RegulationRepository.kt     # 规则仓库
└── store/          # 数据存储
    ├── AIConfigStore.kt            # AI配置存储
    ├── ThemeStore.kt               # 主题存储
    └── VideoConfigStore.kt         # 视频配置存储
```

#### **2. 领域层（Domain Layer）**
```
domain/
├── model/          # 数据模型
│   └── Models.kt   # 所有数据模型定义
└── util/          # 工具类
    ├── VttParser.kt               # VTT 解析器
    ├── TextSegmenter.kt            # 文本分段器
    └── WordAligner.kt              # 词汇对齐工具
```

#### **3. 表现层（UI Layer）**
```
ui/
├── ai/             # AI 设置界面
│   ├── AISettingsSheet.kt         # AI设置弹窗
│   └── AISettingsViewModel.kt      # AI设置 ViewModel
├── assistant/      # 助手功能
│   ├── AssistantSheet.kt           # 助手弹窗
│   └── AssistantViewModel.kt      # 助手 ViewModel
├── component/      # 可复用组件
│   ├── BilibiliLoginDialog.kt     # B站登录对话框
│   ├── GenericLoginDialog.kt      # 通用登录对话框
│   ├── ThemeDialog.kt             # 主题对话框
│   └── VideoDownloadSettingsSheet.kt # 视频下载设置弹窗
├── home/           # 主界面
│   ├── HomeScreen.kt              # 主界面
│   └── HomeViewModel.kt           # 主界面 ViewModel
├── player/         # 播放器界面
│   ├── PlayerScreen.kt            # 播放器界面
│   └── PlayerViewModel.kt         # 播放器 ViewModel
├── regulation/     # 规则界面
│   ├── RegulationScreen.kt       # 规则界面
│   └── RegulationViewModel.kt      # 规则 ViewModel
├── vocabulary/     # 词汇界面
│   ├── VocabularyScreen.kt        # 词汇界面
│   └── VocabularyViewModel.kt     # 词汇 ViewModel
└── theme/          # 主题
    └── Theme.kt                   # 主题定义
```

#### **4. 服务层（Service Layer）**
```
service/
└── TranscriptionService.kt        # 转录服务
```

#### **5. 依赖注入（DI）**
```
di/
└── AppModule.kt                   # 应用模块配置
```

#### **6. 导航（Navigation）**
```
navigation/
└── NavGraph.kt                    # 导航图
```

### **关键功能详解**

#### **1. 视频链接解析（VideoDownloadService.kt）**

**支持的平台：**
- YouTube（youtube.com, youtu.be）
- B站（bilibili.com, b23.tv）
- 抖音（douyin.com, iesdouyin.com）
- TikTok（tiktok.com）
- 微博（weibo.com）
- 小红书（xiaohongshu.com, xhslink.com）
- 直接视频链接（.mp4, .m3u8, .mpd）

**平台检测逻辑：**
```kotlin
fun detectPlatform(url: String): VideoPlatform {
    val lowerUrl = url.lowercase()
    return when {
        lowerUrl.contains("youtube.com") || lowerUrl.contains("youtu.be") -> VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE
        lowerUrl.contains("bilibili.com") || lowerUrl.contains("b23.tv") -> VideoPlatform.BILIBILI
        lowerUrl.contains("douyin.com") || lowerUrl.contains("iesdouyin.com") -> VideoPlatform.DOUYIN
        lowerUrl.contains("tiktok.com") -> VideoPlatform.TIKTOK
        // ... 其他平台
    }
}
```

**Cookie 支持机制：**
```kotlin
fun isCookieRequired(url: String): Boolean {
    return when {
        url.contains("bilibili.com") || url.contains("b23.tv") -> bilibiliCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
        url.contains("youtube.com") || url.contains("youtu.be") -> youtubeCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
        url.contains("douyin.com") || url.contains("iesdouyin.com") -> douyinCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
        url.contains("tiktok.com") -> tiktokCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
        else -> false
    }
}
```

#### **2. 转录功能**

**转录服务架构：**
1. **WhisperService** - 基础 Whisper API 调用
2. **SegmentedWhisperService** - 处理大文件的分段转录
3. **FFmpegSegmentedTranscriptionService** - 使用 FFmpeg 处理音频分段

**转录流程：**
```kotlin
// 1. 使用 FFmpeg 分割音频
val segments = splitAudioWithFFmpeg(videoFile, TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE)

// 2. 并行处理每个分段
val results = coroutineScope {
    segments.map { segment ->
        async {
            whisperService.transcribeGroq(segment, config, lang)
        }
    }.awaitAll()
}

// 3. 合并结果
val finalResult = mergeTranscriptionResults(results)
```

**文件大小限制：**
- Groq API 限制：100MB
- 分段大小：20MB（推荐分段 150MB）
- 自动重试机制：最多 3 次

#### **3. 主要数据模型**

**VideoEntity：**
```kotlin
@Entity(tableName = "videos")
data class VideoEntity(
    @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true) val id: Long = 0,
    @ColumnInfo(name = "title") val title: String,
    @ColumnInfo(name = "file_path") val filePath: String,
    @ColumnInfo(name = "vtt_path") val vttPath: String?,        // VTT 字幕路径
    @ColumnInfo(name = "word_ts_path") val wordTsPath: String?, // 词级时间戳路径
    @ColumnInfo(name = "language") val language: String = "en",
    @ColumnInfo(name = "duration") val duration: Long = 0,
    @ColumnInfo(name = "source_url") val sourceUrl: String?,
    @ColumnInfo(name = "created_at") val createdAt: Long = System.currentTimeMillis()
)
```

**AIConfig：**
```kotlin
data class AIConfig(
    val provider: String = "zhipu",           // AI提供商
    val apiKey: String,                       // API密钥
    val baseUrl: String,                      // 自定义baseUrl
    val model: String,                        // 模型名称
    val groqWhisperEnabled: Boolean = true,   // 是否使用Groq Whisper
    val whisperModel: String = "whisper-large-v3",
    val subtitleTranslateMode: String = "none", // 字幕翻译模式
    val groqApiKey: String,                   // 专门的Groq API Key
    val transcribeLanguage: String = ""      // 转录语言
)
```

#### **4. 前台服务（Foreground Services）**

**VideoDownloadForegroundService：**
- 支持后台下载
- 显示下载进度通知
- 支持暂停/继续/取消操作
- 后台继续下载

**TranscriptionService：**
- 前台转录服务
- 显示转录进度
- 支持队列管理
- 应用关闭后继续转录

#### **5. 应用架构特点**

1. **MVVM 架构**：使用 ViewModel + Compose
2. **依赖注入**：使用 Hilt 进行依赖注入
3. **Room 数据库**：用于本地数据存储
4. **协程**：使用 Kotlin 协程处理异步操作
5. **状态管理**：使用 StateFlow 管理状态

### **技术栈总结**

- **开发语言**：Kotlin
- **UI 框架**：Jetpack Compose
- **架构模式**：MVVM
- **依赖注入**：Hilt
- **数据库**：Room
- **异步处理**：Kotlin Coroutines
- **网络请求**：OkHttp
- **媒体处理**：FFmpeg Kit
- **AI服务**：Groq Whisper API、OpenAI、Claude等

### **主要工作流程**

1. **视频下载流程**：
   - 用户输入 URL → 检测平台 → 获取 Cookie（需要时）→ 调用对应 API 解析 → 下载视频 → 保存到数据库

2. **转录流程**：
   - 选择视频 → 配置 AI 参数 → 调用转录服务 → 分段处理（大文件）→ 合并结果 → 生成字幕和词级时间戳

3. **翻译流程**：
   - 选择字幕 → 选择语言 → 调用翻译服务（百度/DeepL）→ 生成翻译字幕

这个项目是一个功能完整的多语言学习应用，集成了视频下载、语音转录、字幕生成和翻译等功能，架构清晰，代码组织良好。

这个项目是一个功能完整的多语言学习应用，集成了视频下载、语音转录、字幕生成和翻译等功能，架构清晰，代码组织良好。

Based on the search results, I found information about **whisper_android** - a popular Android offline speech recognition project. Let me provide a summary:

## Search Results: Whisper Android Offline Transcription

### Main Project Found: **whisper_android**
- **Repository Mirror**: https://gitcode.com/gh_mirrors/wh/whisper_android
- **Description**: Offline Speech Recognition with OpenAI Whisper and TensorFlow Lite for Android

### Key Features:
| Feature | Details |
|---------|---------|
| **Network** | ✅ Completely offline - no internet required |
| **Languages** | 99 languages supported |
| **Privacy** | All processing done locally on device |
| **Architecture** | Two versions available: Java and Native (C++) |
| **Framework** | TensorFlow Lite for mobile optimization |

### Technical Highlights:
- Uses OpenAI's Whisper model converted to TensorFlow Lite format
- Audio input → Preprocessing → Whisper model inference → Text output
- Supports WAV format with 16KHz sampling rate, mono channel
- Chinese transcription accuracy up to 90%+ in quiet environments

### Versions Available:
1. **Java Version** (`whisper_java`): Uses TensorFlow Lite Java API, easier for most Android developers
2. **Native Version** (`whisper_native`): Uses TensorFlow Lite Native API, better performance

### Quick Start:
```bash
git clone https://gitcode.com/gh_mirrors/wh/whisper_android
```

| 项目信息 | 详情 |
|---------|------|
| **GitHub Stars** | 14k+ ⭐ |
| **开发者** | evil0ctal |
| **Docker镜像** | `evil0ctal/douyin_tiktok_download_api:latest` |

#### 主要功能：
- ✅ 支持 API 调用
- ✅ 在线批量解析及下载**无水印视频**或图集
- ✅ 支持多平台：**抖音、快手、TikTok、B站**等
- ✅ 高性能异步架构
- ✅ 开箱即用
- ✅ 支持 Docker 一键部署

#### 相关资源链接：
1. **介绍文章** - [什么值得买推荐](https://post.m.smzdm.com/zz/p/amv57rzd/)
2. **Docker部署教程** - [掘金文章](https://juejin.cn/post/7552584517866356786)
3. **CSDN详细介绍** - [博客文章](https://m.blog.csdn.net/weixin_44002151/article/details/135349550)
4. **14k Star介绍** - [什么值得买](https://post.m.smzdm.com/zz/p/ax657ov2/)

---

### 📱 其他相关项目

| 项目名 | 描述 | 链接 |
|--------|------|------|
| **douyin-vue** | Vue3移动端仿抖音/TikTok项目，最佳实践 | [CSDN介绍](https://volcengine.csdn.net/695259965b9f5f31781ba6e4.html) |
| **GitHub_Trending/do/douyin** | Vue.js仿抖音完整项目（含后端API设计） | [GitCode](https://gitcode.com/GitHub_Trending/do/douyin) |

---

### 🛠️ 使用建议

1. **Docker部署方式**：
   ```bash
   docker pull evil0ctal/douyin_tiktok_download_api:latest
   ```

2. **提高下载成功率的技巧**：
   - 使用代理IP分散请求
   - 降低并发数
   - 延长请求间隔（如 `-delay 2`）
   - 定期更新 Cookie

3. **注意事项**：
   - 当前版本主要支持抖音，TikTok 需额外配置地区参数
   - 仅支持已关注的私有账号视频下载（需提供Cookie）

---

## Search Results: Faster-Whisper Android Mobile Transcription Implementation

Based on the web search, here's a comprehensive summary of relevant information:

### 🚀 Faster-Whisper Overview

**Faster-Whisper** is a CTranslate2-optimized reimplementation of OpenAI's Whisper model with impressive performance gains:

| Metric | Original Whisper | Faster-Whisper |
|--------|------------------|----------------|
| GPU Speed (13min audio) | 4m 30s | **54s** |
| GPU Memory | 11.3GB | **4.8GB** (INT8: 3.1GB) |
| CPU Speed | 10m 31s | **2m 44s** |
| CPU Memory | 3.1GB | **1.7GB** |

### 📱 Android-Specific Implementations

For Android mobile transcription, the search found **whisper_android** project:

**Key Features:**
- Offline speech recognition using OpenAI Whisper + TensorFlow Lite
- Two implementation options:
  - **whisper_java**: Java-based, easier integration
  - **whisper_native**: Better performance, native code
- Supports WAV format (16KHz sample rate, mono channel)
- Chinese accuracy up to 90% in quiet environments

**Requirements:**
- Android 8.0+
- At least 2GB storage
- Android Studio 2022.3.1+
- Java 11+

### 🔗 Project Links

1. **faster-whisper**: https://gitcode.com/gh_mirrors/fas/faster-whisper
2. **whisper_android**: https://gitcode.com/gh_mirrors/wh/whisper_android

### 💡 Key Insight

**Important Note:** Faster-Whisper itself is primarily a Python library designed for desktop/server use with CTranslate2. For **direct Android implementation**, the typical approach is to use:
- TensorFlow Lite with converted Whisper models
- SherpaNcnn framework for mobile neural network inference

content.content:
1→package com.multilanglearner.data.network
     2→
     3→import android.util.Log
     4→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.AIConfig
     5→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.WordTimestamp
     6→import kotlinx.serialization.Serializable
     7→import kotlinx.serialization.json.*
     8→import okhttp3.*
     9→import okhttp3.MediaType.Companion.toMediaType
    10→import okhttp3.RequestBody.Companion.asRequestBody
    11→import okhttp3.RequestBody.Companion.toRequestBody
    12→import java.io.File
    13→import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
    14→import javax.inject.Inject
    15→import javax.inject.Singleton
    16→
    17→@Serializable
    18→data class WhisperResult(
    19→    val success: Boolean,
    20→    val text: String = "",
    21→    val words: List<WordTimestamp> = emptyList(),
    22→    val detectedLang: String = "",
    23→    val error: String = ""
    24→)
    25→
    26→@Singleton
    27→class WhisperService @Inject constructor() {
    28→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    29→        .connectTimeout(15, TimeUnit.SECONDS)  // 减少连接超时，加快重试
    30→        .readTimeout(600, TimeUnit.SECONDS)    // 增加读取超时，支持长音频
    31→        .writeTimeout(120, TimeUnit.SECONDS)   // 增加写入超时
    32→        .retryOnConnectionFailure(true)        // 启用自动重试
    33→        .build()
    34→
    35→    private val json = Json { ignoreUnknownKeys = true }
    36→
    37→    // Groq API 文件大小限制（增加到 100MB，Groq 实际支持更大）
    38→    private val MAX_FILE_SIZE = 100 * 1024 * 1024L
    39→    private val MIN_FILE_SIZE = 1024L // 最小 1KB，避免空文件或太小的文件
    40→
    41→    // 最大重试次数
    42→    private val MAX_RETRIES = 3
    43→
    44→    /**
    45→     * Transcribe audio via Groq Whisper API
    46→     * 优先使用 groqApiKey，其次使用 provider 为 groq 时的 apiKey
    47→     * 添加自动重试机制
    48→     */
    49→    suspend fun transcribeGroq(audioFile: File, config: AIConfig, lang: String? = null): WhisperResult? {
    50→        // 自动重试逻辑
    51→        var lastError: Exception? = null
    52→        repeat(MAX_RETRIES) { attempt ->
    53→            if (attempt > 0) {
    54→                Log.d("WhisperService", "Retry $attempt/$MAX_RETRIES")
    55→                kotlinx.coroutines.delay(2000L * attempt) // 递增延迟
    56→            }
    57→
    58→            val result = transcribeGroqInternal(audioFile, config, lang)
    59→            if (result?.success == true) {
    60→                return result
    61→            }
    62→            lastError = Exception(result?.error ?: "Unknown error")
    63→        }
    64→
    65→        // 所有重试都失败
    66→        return WhisperResult(
    67→            success = false,
    68→            error = "❌ 转录失败（已重试 $MAX_RETRIES 次）\n\n${lastError?.message ?: "未知错误"}\n\n建议：检查网络连接和 API Key 配置"
    69→        )
    70→    }
    71→
    72→    /**
    73→     * 内部转录实现
    74→     */
    75→    private suspend fun transcribeGroqInternal(audioFile: File, config: AIConfig, lang: String? = null): WhisperResult? {
    76→        // 获取 Groq API Key：优先使用专门的 groqApiKey，其次检查 provider 是否为 groq
    77→        val apiKey = config.groqApiKey.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
    78→            ?: (config.apiKey.takeIf { config.provider == "groq" && it.isNotBlank() })
    79→            ?: return WhisperResult(success = false, error = "❌ 未配置 Groq API Key\n\n请前往「AI 设置」配置 Groq API Key。\n获取 API Key：https://console.groq.com/keys")
    80→
    81→        val whisperModel = config.whisperModel.ifBlank { "whisper-large-v3-turbo" }
    82→
    83→        // 检查文件大小
    84→        val fileSize = audioFile.length()
    85→        Log.d("WhisperService", "File size: $fileSize bytes, max: $MAX_FILE_SIZE")
    86→
    87→        // 检查最小文件大小
    88→        if (fileSize < MIN_FILE_SIZE) {
    89→            Log.e("WhisperService", "File too small: $fileSize bytes (min: $MIN_FILE_SIZE)")
    90→            return WhisperResult(
    91→                success = false,
    92→                error = "❌ 视频文件过小\n\n文件大小: ${fileSize / 1024} KB\n最小要求: 1 KB\n\n建议：请使用包含音频内容的有效视频文件"
    93→            )
    94→        }
    95→
    96→        if (fileSize > MAX_FILE_SIZE) {
    97→            val sizeMB = String.format("%.2f", fileSize / 1024.0 / 1024.0)
    98→            val maxMB = String.format("%.2f", MAX_FILE_SIZE / 1024.0 / 1024.0)
    99→            Log.e("WhisperService", "File too large: $sizeMB MB (max: $maxMB MB)")
   100→            return WhisperResult(
   101→                success = false,
   102→                error = "❌ 视频文件过大\n\n文件大小: $sizeMB MB\nGroq 限制: $maxMB MB\n\n建议解决方案：\n1. 使用较短的视频片段\n2. 在电脑上用 ffmpeg 压缩视频\n3. 在电脑上使用 yt-dlp 只下载音频"
   103→            )
   104→        }
   105→
   106→        Log.d("WhisperService", "Starting transcription with Groq Whisper: model=$whisperModel, file=${audioFile.name}, size=$fileSize")
   107→
   108→        val bodyBuilder = MultipartBody.Builder().setType(MultipartBody.FORM)
   109→            .addFormDataPart("file", audioFile.name, audioFile.asRequestBody("application/octet-stream".toMediaType()))
   110→            .addFormDataPart("model", whisperModel)
   111→            .addFormDataPart("response_format", "verbose_json")
   112→            .addFormDataPart("timestamp_granularities[]", "word")
   113→            .addFormDataPart("timestamp_granularities[]", "segment")
   114→            .addFormDataPart("temperature", "0")
   115→            .addFormDataPart("prompt", "Transcribe accurately with proper punctuation and capitalization.")
   116→
   117→        lang?.let { bodyBuilder.addFormDataPart("language", it) }
   118→
   119→        val request = Request.Builder()
   120→            .url("https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/audio/transcriptions")
   121→            .addHeader("Authorization", "Bearer $apiKey")
   122→            .post(bodyBuilder.build())
   123→            .build()
   124→
   125→        return try {
   126→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Sending request to Groq API...")
   127→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   128→
   129→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Response code: ${response.code}")
   130→
   131→            if (response.code != 200) {
   132→                val errorBody = response.body?.string() ?: "Unknown error"
   133→                Log.e("WhisperService", "API error: $errorBody")
   134→
   135→                // 解析错误信息
   136→                val errorMsg = try {
   137→                    val errorJson = json.parseToJsonElement(errorBody).jsonObject
   138→                    val errObj = errorJson["error"]?.jsonObject
   139→                    val errMsg = errObj?.get("message")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
   140→                    val errType = errObj?.get("type")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
   141→                    val errCode = errObj?.get("code")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
   142→
   143→                    when {
   144→                        errMsg?.contains("invalid_api_key", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   145→                        errMsg?.contains("Unauthorized", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   146→                        response.code == 401 ->
   147→                            "❌ API Key 无效\n\n请检查 Groq API Key 是否正确配置\n\n获取 API Key：https://console.groq.com/keys"
   148→                        errMsg?.contains("quota", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   149→                        errMsg?.contains("limit", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   150→                        errMsg?.contains("rate_limit", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   151→                        response.code == 429 ->
   152→                            "❌ API 配额已用完\n\nGroq API 使用次数已达限制\n\n建议：\n1. 等待配额重置\n2. 更换 API Key\n3. 升级 Groq 账户"
   153→                        errMsg?.contains("forbidden", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   154→                        errMsg?.contains("banned", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   155→                        response.code == 403 ->
   156→                            "❌ 转录被禁止\n\n${errMsg ?: "访问被限制"}\n\n可能原因：\n1. API Key 被禁用\n2. 账户存在违规行为\n3. 内容不符合使用条款"
   157→                        else -> "❌ 转录失败 ($response.code)\n\n${errMsg ?: errorBody}"
   158→                    }
   159→                } catch (e: Exception) {
   160→                    "❌ 转录失败\n\n${errorBody.take(200)}"
   161→                }
   162→
   163→                return WhisperResult(success = false, error = errorMsg)
   164→            }
   165→
   166→            val body = response.body?.string() ?: return WhisperResult(success = false, error = "空响应")
   167→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Response length: ${body.length}")
   168→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Response body preview: ${body.take(500)}")
   169→
   170→            // 检查响应是否为有效的 JSON
   171→            if (!body.trim().startsWith("{") && !body.trim().startsWith("[")) {
   172→                Log.e("WhisperService", "Response is not valid JSON: ${body.take(200)}")
   173→                return WhisperResult(
   174→                    success = false,
   175→                    error = "❌ API 返回格式错误\n\nGroq API 返回了非 JSON 格式的响应。\n\n响应内容：\n${body.take(500)}"
   176→                )
   177→            }
   178→
   179→            try {
   180→                val jsonObj = json.parseToJsonElement(body).jsonObject
   181→                val text = jsonObj["text"]?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull ?: ""
   182→                val detectedLang = jsonObj["language"]?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull ?: ""
   183→
   184→                Log.d("WhisperService", "Transcribed text length: ${text.length}, detected language: $detectedLang")
   185→
   186→                val words = jsonObj["words"]?.jsonArray?.map { w ->
   187→                    val obj = w.jsonObject
   188→                    WordTimestamp(
   189→                        w = obj["word"]?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull ?: "",
   190→                        s = (obj["start"]?.jsonPrimitive?.doubleOrNull ?: 0.0),
   191→                        e = (obj["end"]?.jsonPrimitive?.doubleOrNull ?: 0.0)
   192→                    )
   193→                } ?: emptyList()
   194→
   195→                Log.d("WhisperService", "Word timestamps count: ${words.size}")
   196→
   197→                WhisperResult(
   198→                    success = true,
   199→                    text = text,
   200→                    words = words,
   201→                    detectedLang = detectedLang
   202→                )
   203→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   204→                Log.e("WhisperService", "JSON parsing error", e)
   205→                Log.e("WhisperService", "Response body: $body")
   206→                WhisperResult(
   207→                    success = false,
   208→                    error = "❌ 响应解析失败\n\nGroq API 返回了无法解析的响应。\n\n错误: ${e.message}\n\n响应内容：\n${body.take(500)}"
   209→                )
   210→            }
   211→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   212→            Log.e("WhisperService", "Transcription error", e)
   213→            val errorMsg = when {
   214→                e.message?.contains("timeout", ignoreCase = true) == true ->
   215→                    "❌ 请求超时\n\n网络连接超时，请检查网络连接后重试。"
   216→                e.message?.contains("Unable to resolve host", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   217→                e.message?.contains("UnknownHost", ignoreCase = true) == true ->
   218→                    "❌ 网络连接失败\n\n无法连接到 Groq API 服务器，请检查网络连接。"
   219→                else -> "❌ 转录失败\n\n${e.message ?: "未知错误"}\n\n请检查网络连接和 API Key 配置后重试。"
   220→            }
   221→            WhisperResult(success = false, error = errorMsg)
   222→        }
   223→    }
   224→}
   225→

1→package com.multilanglearner.data.network
     2→
     3→import android.util.Log
     4→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
     5→import kotlinx.coroutines.async
     6→import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
     7→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
     8→import kotlinx.coroutines.yield
     9→import okhttp3.OkHttpClient
    10→import java.io.File
    11→import java.io.IOException
    12→import java.io.RandomAccessFile
    13→import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
    14→import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicBoolean
    15→import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicLong
    16→import javax.inject.Inject
    17→import javax.inject.Singleton
    18→
    19→/**
    20→ * 分段下载管理器
    21→ * 支持大文件分段下载和断点续传
    22→ *
    23→ * 功能特性：
    24→ * - 支持大文件（>100MB）分段下载
    25→ * - 改进的断点续传（包含校验和）
    26→ * - 详细的进度回调（分段信息、速度、剩余时间）
    27→ * - 并发下载优化
    28→ * - 增强的错误处理和重试机制
    29→ * - 支持取消下载
    30→ */
    31→@Singleton
    32→class SegmentedDownloader @Inject constructor() {
    33→
    34→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    35→        .connectTimeout(60, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    36→        .readTimeout(300, TimeUnit.SECONDS) // 5分钟读超时，适合大文件下载
    37→        .writeTimeout(300, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    38→        .build()
    39→
    40→    // 每个分段的大小（5MB）
    41→    private val SEGMENT_SIZE = 5L * 1024 * 1024
    42→
    43→    // 最小分段大小（1MB，小于此文件不分段）
    44→    private val MIN_SEGMENT_SIZE = 1L * 1024 * 1024
    45→
    46→    // 大文件阈值（100MB，超过此值使用更大的分段）
    47→    private val LARGE_FILE_THRESHOLD = 100L * 1024 * 1024
    48→
    49→    // 大文件分段大小（10MB）
    50→    private val LARGE_SEGMENT_SIZE = 10L * 1024 * 1024
    51→
    52→    // 最大并发下载数
    53→    private val MAX_CONCURRENT_DOWNLOADS = 3
    54→
    55→    // 最大重试次数
    56→    private val MAX_RETRY_COUNT = 5
    57→    // 重试延迟（毫秒）
    58→    private val RETRY_DELAY_MS = 3000L
    59→
    60→    // 当前下载的取消标志
    61→    private val currentCancellationFlag = AtomicBoolean(false)
    62→
    63→    /**
    64→     * 下载进度回调
    65→     */
    66→    data class DownloadProgress(
    67→        val bytesDownloaded: Long,
    68→        val totalBytes: Long,
    69→        val percent: Int,
    70→        val speed: Long, // bytes per second
    71→        val segmentIndex: Int, // 当前分段索引（1-based）
    72→        val totalSegments: Int, // 总分段数
    73→        val completedSegments: Set<Int>, // 已完成的分段索引集合
    74→        val currentSegmentBytes: Long = 0, // 当前分段已下载字节数
    75→        val currentSegmentTotal: Long = 0, // 当前分段总字节数
    76→        val remainingTimeSeconds: Long = 0, // 预计剩余时间（秒）
    77→        val activeConnections: Int = 1 // 当前活跃连接数
    78→    )
    79→
    80→    /**
    81→     * 下载配置
    82→     */
    83→    data class DownloadConfig(
    84→        val url: String,
    85→        val outputFile: File,
    86→        val segmentSize: Long = 5L * 1024 * 1024, // 5MB
    87→        val enableResume: Boolean = true,
    88→        val maxRetries: Int = 3,
    89→        val concurrentDownloads: Int = 3,
    90→        val cookies: String? = null, // 添加Cookie支持
    91→        val audioUrl: String? = null, // 音频流URL（用于DASH格式）
    92→        val onProgress: (DownloadProgress) -> Unit = {},
    93→        val onSegmentComplete: (segmentIndex: Int, success: Boolean) -> Unit = { _, _ -> }
    94→    )
    95→
    96→    /**
    97→     * 分段状态信息
    98→     */
    99→    private data class SegmentState(
   100→        val index: Int,
   101→        val start: Long,
   102→        val end: Long,
   103→        val downloadedBytes: Long = 0,
   104→        val isCompleted: Boolean = false,
   105→        val checksum: Long = 0 // 简单校验和
   106→    )
   107→
   108→    /**
   109→     * 断点续传状态
   110→     */
   111→    private data class ResumeState(
   112→        val fileSize: Long,
   113→        val segmentSize: Long,
   114→        val segments: List<SegmentState>,
   115→        val timestamp: Long = System.currentTimeMillis()
   116→    )
   117→    suspend fun download(config: DownloadConfig): Result<File> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   118→        try {
   119→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Starting download: ${config.url}")
   120→
   121→            // 如果有音频URL，使用音视频合并流程
   122→            if (config.audioUrl != null) {
   123→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Audio URL provided, using merge mode")
   124→                return@withContext downloadAndMerge(config)
   125→            }
   126→
   127→            // 获取文件大小
   128→            val fileSize = getContentLength(config.url)
   129→            if (fileSize <= 0) {
   130→                // 不支持分段下载，使用普通下载
   131→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Segmented download not supported, using simple download")
   132→                return@withContext simpleDownload(config)
   133→            }
   134→
   135→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "File size: $fileSize bytes")
   136→
   137→            // 判断是否需要分段
   138→            if (fileSize < MIN_SEGMENT_SIZE) {
   139→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "File too small for segmentation, using simple download")
   140→                return@withContext simpleDownload(config)
   141→            }
   142→
   143→            // 计算分段数量
   144→            val segmentCount = ((fileSize + config.segmentSize - 1) / config.segmentSize).toInt()
   145→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Splitting into $segmentCount segments")
   146→
   147→            // 创建临时文件
   148→            val tempFile = File(config.outputFile.absolutePath + ".tmp")
   149→            val raf = RandomAccessFile(tempFile, "rw")
   150→            raf.setLength(fileSize)
   151→
   152→            // 下载每个分段
   153→            val downloadedSegments = if (config.enableResume) {
   154→                loadResumeState(tempFile)
   155→            } else {
   156→                mutableSetOf()
   157→            }
   158→
   159→            var totalDownloaded = 0L
   160→            val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   161→
   162→            for (i in 0 until segmentCount) {
   163→                if (i in downloadedSegments) {
   164→                    Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Segment $i already downloaded, skipping")
   165→                    totalDownloaded += minOf(config.segmentSize, fileSize - i * config.segmentSize)
   166→                    continue
   167→                }
   168→
   169→                val start = i * config.segmentSize
   170→                val end = minOf(start + config.segmentSize - 1, fileSize - 1)
   171→
   172→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Downloading segment $i: $start-$end")
   173→
   174→                try {
   175→                    val success = downloadSegment(config.url, tempFile, start, end, config.cookies) { bytes ->
   176→                        totalDownloaded += bytes
   177→                        val elapsed = (System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime) / 1000.0
   178→                        val speed = if (elapsed > 0) totalDownloaded / elapsed.toLong() else 0
   179→
   180→                        // 计算进度，确保不超过100%
   181→                        val progress = ((totalDownloaded * 100) / fileSize).toInt().coerceAtMost(99)
   182→
   183→                        config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   184→                            bytesDownloaded = totalDownloaded,
   185→                            totalBytes = fileSize,
   186→                            percent = progress,
   187→                            speed = speed,
   188→                            segmentIndex = i + 1,
   189→                            totalSegments = segmentCount,
   190→                            completedSegments = downloadedSegments
   191→                        ))
   192→                    }
   193→
   194→                    if (success) {
   195→                        downloadedSegments.add(i)
   196→                        saveResumeState(tempFile, downloadedSegments)
   197→                    } else {
   198→                        Log.w("SegmentedDownloader", "Segment $i download failed after retries, marking as failed")
   199→                        // 保存断点信息，继续下一段
   200→                        saveResumeState(tempFile, downloadedSegments)
   201→                    }
   202→                } catch (e: Exception) {
   203→                    Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to download segment $i", e)
   204→                    // 保存断点信息，继续下一段
   205→                    saveResumeState(tempFile, downloadedSegments)
   206→                }
   207→            }
   208→
   209→            raf.close()
   210→
   211→            // 发送100%完成进度
   212→            config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   213→                bytesDownloaded = fileSize,
   214→                totalBytes = fileSize,
   215→                percent = 100,
   216→                speed = 0,
   217→                segmentIndex = segmentCount,
   218→                totalSegments = segmentCount,
   219→                completedSegments = downloadedSegments.toSet()
   220→            ))
   221→
   222→            // 重命名为最终文件
   223→            if (config.outputFile.exists()) {
   224→                config.outputFile.delete()
   225→            }
   226→            tempFile.renameTo(config.outputFile)
   227→
   228→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Download completed: ${config.outputFile.absolutePath}")
   229→            Result.success(config.outputFile)
   230→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   231→            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Download failed", e)
   232→            Result.failure(e)
   233→        }
   234→    }
   235→
   236→    /**
   237→     * 下载并合并音频和视频流（用于DASH格式）
   238→     */
   239→    private suspend fun downloadAndMerge(config: DownloadConfig): Result<File> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   240→        Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Starting audio+video merge download")
   241→
   242→        val videoFile = File(config.outputFile.absolutePath + ".video.mp4")
   243→        val audioFile = File(config.outputFile.absolutePath + ".audio.m4a")
   244→        val mergeOutputFile = config.outputFile
   245→
   246→        try {
   247→            // 更新进度：准备下载
   248→            config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   249→                bytesDownloaded = 0,
   250→                totalBytes = 100,
   251→                percent = 0,
   252→                speed = 0,
   253→                segmentIndex = 0,
   254→                totalSegments = 2,
   255→                completedSegments = emptySet()
   256→            ))
   257→
   258→            // 1. 下载视频流
   259→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Downloading video stream...")
   260→            val videoConfig = config.copy(outputFile = videoFile, audioUrl = null)
   261→            val videoResult = simpleDownload(videoConfig)
   262→
   263→            if (videoResult.isFailure) {
   264→                Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to download video: ${videoResult.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   265→                return@withContext Result.failure(videoResult.exceptionOrNull() ?: Exception("视频下载失败"))
   266→            }
   267→
   268→            // 更新进度：视频下载完成
   269→            config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   270→                bytesDownloaded = 50,
   271→                totalBytes = 100,
   272→                percent = 50,
   273→                speed = 0,
   274→                segmentIndex = 1,
   275→                totalSegments = 2,
   276→                completedSegments = setOf(0)
   277→            ))
   278→
   279→            // 2. 下载音频流
   280→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Downloading audio stream...")
   281→            val audioConfig = config.copy(outputFile = audioFile, url = config.audioUrl!!)
   282→            val audioResult = simpleDownload(audioConfig)
   283→
   284→            if (audioResult.isFailure) {
   285→                Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to download audio: ${audioResult.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   286→                // 音频下载失败，仍然尝试使用视频文件
   287→                videoFile.renameTo(mergeOutputFile)
   288→                return@withContext Result.success(mergeOutputFile)
   289→            }
   290→
   291→            // 更新进度：准备合并
   292→            config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   293→                bytesDownloaded = 90,
   294→                totalBytes = 100,
   295→                percent = 90,
   296→                speed = 0,
   297→                segmentIndex = 2,
   298→                totalSegments = 2,
   299→                completedSegments = setOf(0, 1)
   300→            ))
   301→
   302→            // 3. 使用ffmpeg合并音频和视频
   303→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Merging audio and video with ffmpeg...")
   304→            val mergeResult = mergeAudioVideo(videoFile, audioFile, mergeOutputFile)
   305→
   306→            if (mergeResult) {
   307→                // 清理临时文件
   308→                videoFile.delete()
   309→                audioFile.delete()
   310→
   311→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Merge completed: ${mergeOutputFile.absolutePath}")
   312→
   313→                // 发送100%完成进度
   314→                config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   315→                    bytesDownloaded = 100,
   316→                    totalBytes = 100,
   317→                    percent = 100,
   318→                    speed = 0,
   319→                    segmentIndex = 2,
   320→                    totalSegments = 2,
   321→                    completedSegments = setOf(0, 1)
   322→                ))
   323→
   324→                Result.success(mergeOutputFile)
   325→            } else {
   326→                Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to merge audio and video")
   327→                // 合并失败，仍然尝试使用视频文件
   328→                videoFile.renameTo(mergeOutputFile)
   329→                audioFile.delete()
   330→                Result.success(mergeOutputFile)
   331→            }
   332→
   333→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   334→            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Merge download failed", e)
   335→            // 清理临时文件
   336→            if (videoFile.exists()) videoFile.delete()
   337→            if (audioFile.exists()) audioFile.delete()
   338→            Result.failure(e)
   339→        }
   340→    }
   341→
   342→    /**
   343→     * 使用ffmpeg合并音频和视频
   344→     */
   345→    private suspend fun mergeAudioVideo(videoFile: File, audioFile: File, outputFile: File): Boolean = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   346→        try {
   347→            val command = buildString {
   348→                append("-y -i \"${videoFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   349→                append("-i \"${audioFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   350→                append("-c:v copy -c:a aac ")
   351→                append("\"${outputFile.absolutePath}\"")
   352→            }
   353→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "FFmpeg merge command: $command")
   354→
   355→            val session = com.arthenica.ffmpegkit.FFmpegKit.execute(command)
   356→            val returnCode = session.returnCode
   357→            val success = (returnCode?.value == 0) && outputFile.exists() && outputFile.length() > 1024
   358→
   359→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Merge result: $success, return code: ${returnCode?.value}")
   360→            success
   361→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   362→            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "FFmpeg merge error", e)
   363→            false
   364→        }
   365→    }

   367→    /**
   368→     * 简单下载（不支持分段）- 带重试机制
   369→     */
   370→    private suspend fun simpleDownload(config: DownloadConfig): Result<File> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   371→        val maxAttempts = config.maxRetries.coerceAtLeast(MAX_RETRY_COUNT)
   372→        var lastError: Exception? = null
   373→
   374→        for (attempt in 0 until maxAttempts) {
   375→            if (attempt > 0) {
   376→                val delayMs = RETRY_DELAY_MS * attempt
   377→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Retry $attempt/$maxAttempts, delay ${delayMs}ms")
   378→                delay(delayMs)
   379→            }
   380→
   381→            try {
   382→                return@withContext downloadOnce(config)
   383→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   384→                lastError = e
   385→                val isConnectionError = e.message?.contains("connection abort", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   386→                                     e.message?.contains("Software caused connection abort", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   387→                                     e is java.net.SocketException ||
   388→                                     e is javax.net.ssl.SSLException
   389→
   390→                if (isConnectionError && attempt < maxAttempts - 1) {
   391→                    Log.w("SegmentedDownloader", "Connection error (attempt ${attempt + 1}), will retry: ${e.message}")
   392→                    // 删除可能不完整的文件
   393→                    if (config.outputFile.exists()) {
   394→                        config.outputFile.delete()
   395→                    }
   396→                    // 继续下一次尝试
   397→                } else {
   398→                    // 不可重试的错误或已达到最大重试次数
   399→                    break
   400→                }
   401→            }
   402→        }
   403→
   404→        if (lastError != null) {
   405→            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Simple download failed after $maxAttempts retries", lastError)
   406→            Result.failure(lastError)
   407→        } else {
   408→            Result.failure(Exception("Download failed: unknown error"))
   409→        }
   410→    }
   411→
   412→    /**
   413→     * 执行一次下载尝试
   414→     */
   415→    private fun downloadOnce(config: DownloadConfig): Result<File> {
   416→        // 添加完整的 headers 避免返回 403
   417→        val requestBuilder = okhttp3.Request.Builder()
   418→            .url(config.url)
   419→            .header("User-Agent", "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36")
   420→            .header("Referer", getRefererFromUrl(config.url))
   421→            .header("Accept", "*/*")
   422→            .header("Accept-Language", "zh-CN,zh;q=0.9,en;q=0.8")
   423→            .header("Origin", getOriginFromUrl(config.url))
   424→            .header("Connection", "keep-alive")
   425→
   426→        // 添加Cookie（如果提供）
   427→        if (!config.cookies.isNullOrEmpty()) {
   428→            requestBuilder.header("Cookie", config.cookies)
   429→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Using custom cookies for download")
   430→        }
   431→
   432→        val request = requestBuilder.build()
   433→
   434→        val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   435→
   436→        if (!response.isSuccessful) {
   437→            val errorCode = response.code
   438→            val errorDetail = when (errorCode) {
   439→                403 -> {
   440→                    val urlHost = try {
   441→                        java.net.URL(config.url).host
   442→                    } catch (e: Exception) { "未知" }
   443→
   444→                    when {
   445→                        urlHost.contains("bilibili") -> {
   446→                            val hasCookie = !config.cookies.isNullOrEmpty()
   447→                            """
   448→                            HTTP 403 - B站下载被拒绝
   449→
   450→                            当前状态：${if (hasCookie) "已配置Cookie" else "未配置Cookie"}
   451→
   452→                            可能原因：
   453→                            ${if (hasCookie) "• Cookie已过期或无效\n• 视频需要更高权限\n• 下载链接已过期" else "• 视频需要登录才能下载\n• 视频是会员专享内容\n• 下载链接已过期"}
   454→
   455→                            解决方案：
   456→                            ${if (hasCookie) "1. 重新配置B站Cookie（可能已过期）\n2. 检查账号是否有该视频的访问权限" else "1. 点击「下载设置」配置Cookie\n2. 确保SESSDATA填写正确"}
   457→                            3. 或使用「导入本地视频」功能
   458→                            4. 在电脑上使用 yt-dlp 下载后再导入
   459→                        """.trimIndent()
   460→                        }
   461→
   462→                        urlHost.contains("youtube") || urlHost.contains("googlevideo") -> """
   463→                            HTTP 403 - YouTube下载被拒绝
   464→
   465→                            可能原因：
   466→                            • 视频有地区限制
   467→                            • 下载链接已过期
   468→                            • YouTube检测到自动化下载
   469→
   470→                            解决方案：
   471→                            1. 稍后重试（可能是临时限制）
   472→                            2. 使用「导入本地视频」功能
   473→                            3. 在电脑上使用 yt-dlp 下载后再导入
   474→                        """.trimIndent()
   475→
   476→                        else -> """
   477→                            HTTP 403 - 访问被拒绝
   478→
   479→                            可能原因：
   480→                            • 服务器拒绝访问
   481→                            • 需要认证才能下载
   482→
   483→                            解决方案：
   484→                            1. 使用「导入本地视频」功能
   485→                        """.trimIndent()
   486→                    }
   487→                }
   488→                410 -> "HTTP 410 - 下载链接已过期，请重新解析视频"
   489→                404 -> "HTTP 404 - 视频文件不存在，可能已被删除"
   490→                else -> "HTTP $errorCode - 下载失败"
   491→            }
   492→            throw IOException(errorDetail)
   493→        }
   494→
   495→        val body = response.body ?: throw IOException("No response body")
   496→        val inputStream = body.byteStream()
   497→        val totalBytes = body.contentLength()
   498→        var downloadedBytes = 0L
   499→        val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   500→
   501→        config.outputFile.outputStream().use { output ->
   502→            val buffer = ByteArray(8 * 1024)
   503→            var bytes: Int
   504→
   505→            while (inputStream.read(buffer).also { bytes = it } > 0) {
   506→                output.write(buffer, 0, bytes)
   507→                downloadedBytes += bytes
   508→
   509→                val elapsed = (System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime) / 1000.0
   510→                val speed = if (elapsed > 0) (downloadedBytes / elapsed).toLong() else 0
   511→
   512→                if (totalBytes > 0) {
   513→                    config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   514→                        bytesDownloaded = downloadedBytes,
   515→                        totalBytes = totalBytes,
   516→                        percent = ((downloadedBytes * 100) / totalBytes).toInt().coerceAtMost(99),
   517→                        speed = speed,
   518→                        segmentIndex = 1,
   519→                        totalSegments = 1,
   520→                        completedSegments = emptySet()
   521→                    ))
   522→                }
   523→            }
   524→        }
   525→
   526→        // 发送100%完成进度
   527→        config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   528→            bytesDownloaded = config.outputFile.length(),
   529→            totalBytes = config.outputFile.length(),
   530→            percent = 100,
   531→            speed = 0,
   532→            segmentIndex = 1,
   533→            totalSegments = 1,
   534→            completedSegments = setOf(0)
   535→        ))
   536→
   537→        return Result.success(config.outputFile)
   538→    }
   539→
   540→    /**
   541→     * 下载单个分段 - 带重试机制
   542→     */
   543→    private fun downloadSegment(
   544→        url: String,
   545→        file: File,
   546→        start: Long,
   547→        end: Long,
   548→        cookies: String?,
   549→        onBytesDownloaded: (Long) -> Unit
   550→    ): Boolean {
   551→        var lastError: Exception? = null
   552→
   553→        repeat(MAX_RETRY_COUNT) { attempt ->
   554→            if (attempt > 0) {
   555→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Segment $start-$end retry $attempt/$MAX_RETRY_COUNT")
   556→                try {
   557→                    Thread.sleep(RETRY_DELAY_MS * attempt)
   558→                } catch (e: InterruptedException) {
   559→                    return false
   560→                }
   561→            }
   562→
   563→            try {
   564→                // 添加完整的 headers 避免返回 403
   565→                val requestBuilder = okhttp3.Request.Builder()
   566→                    .url(url)
   567→                    .header("Range", "bytes=$start-$end")
   568→                    .header("User-Agent", "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36")
   569→                    .header("Referer", getRefererFromUrl(url))
   570→                    .header("Accept", "*/*")
   571→                    .header("Accept-Language", "zh-CN,zh;q=0.9,en;q=0.8")
   572→                    .header("Origin", getOriginFromUrl(url))
   573→
   574→                // 添加Cookie（如果提供）
   575→                if (!cookies.isNullOrEmpty()) {
   576→                    requestBuilder.header("Cookie", cookies)
   577→                }
   578→
   579→                val request = requestBuilder.build()
   580→                val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   581→
   582→                if (response.code !in 200..299) {
   583→                    val errorCode = response.code
   584→                    val urlHost = try { java.net.URL(url).host } catch (e: Exception) { "未知" }
   585→                    val errorMsg = when (errorCode) {
   586→                        403 -> {
   587→                            val hasCookie = !cookies.isNullOrEmpty()
   588→                            val isBilibili = urlHost.contains("bilibili") || urlHost.contains("bilivideo")
   589→                            if (isBilibili) {
   590→                                "HTTP 403 - B站下载被拒绝 ${if (hasCookie) "(已配置Cookie，可能已过期)" else "(未配置Cookie)"}"
   591→                            } else {
   592→                                "HTTP 403 - 下载被拒绝，可能需要Cookie或链接已过期"
   593→                            }
   594→                        }
   595→                        else -> "HTTP $errorCode - 分段下载失败"
   596→                    }
   597→                    throw IOException("$errorMsg (segment $start-$end)")
   598→                }
   599→
   600→                val inputStream = response.body?.byteStream() ?: throw IOException("No response body")
   601→                val raf = RandomAccessFile(file, "rw")
   602→                raf.seek(start)
   603→
   604→                val buffer = ByteArray(8 * 1024)
   605→                var bytes: Int
   606→                var totalBytes = 0L
   607→
   608→                while (inputStream.read(buffer).also { bytes = it } > 0) {
   609→                    raf.write(buffer, 0, bytes)
   610→                    totalBytes += bytes
   611→                    onBytesDownloaded(bytes.toLong())
   612→                }
   613→
   614→                raf.close()
   615→                inputStream.close()
   616→                return true
   617→
   618→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   619→                lastError = e
   620→                val isConnectionError = e.message?.contains("connection abort", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   621→                                     e.message?.contains("Software caused connection abort", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   622→                                     e is java.net.SocketException ||
   623→                                     e is javax.net.ssl.SSLException
   624→
   625→                if (!isConnectionError || attempt >= MAX_RETRY_COUNT - 1) {
   626→                    Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Segment $start-$end download failed", e)
   627→                    return false
   628→                }
   629→                Log.w("SegmentedDownloader", "Segment $start-$end connection error, will retry: ${e.message}")
   630→            }
   631→        }
   632→
   633→        Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Segment $start-$end failed after $MAX_RETRY_COUNT retries", lastError)
   634→        return false
   635→    }
   636→
   637→    /**
   638→     * 获取文件内容长度
   639→     */
   640→    private fun getContentLength(url: String): Long {
   641→        return try {
   642→            // 添加必要的 headers
   643→            val request = okhttp3.Request.Builder()
   644→                .url(url)
   645→                .head()
   646→                .header("User-Agent", "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36")
   647→                .header("Referer", getRefererFromUrl(url))
   648→                .build()
   649→
   650→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   651→
   652→            // 检查是否支持断点续传
   653→            val acceptRanges = response.header("Accept-Ranges") == "bytes"
   654→            val contentLength = response.body?.contentLength() ?: 0
   655→
   656→            if (acceptRanges && contentLength > 0) {
   657→                contentLength
   658→            } else {
   659→                0
   660→            }
   661→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   662→            Log.w("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to get content length", e)
   663→            0
   664→        }
   665→    }
   666→
   667→    /**
   668→     * 保存断点状态
   669→     */
   670→    private fun saveResumeState(file: File, segments: Set<Int>) {
   671→        try {
   672→            val stateFile = File(file.absolutePath + ".resume")
   673→            stateFile.writeText(segments.joinToString(","))
   674→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   675→            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to save resume state", e)
   676→        }
   677→    }
   678→
   679→    /**
   680→     * 加载断点状态
   681→     */
   682→    private fun loadResumeState(file: File): MutableSet<Int> {
   683→        return try {
   684→            val stateFile = File(file.absolutePath + ".resume")
   685→            if (stateFile.exists()) {
   686→                val content = stateFile.readText()
   687→                if (content.isNotBlank()) {
   688→                    content.split(",").mapNotNull { it.toIntOrNull() }.toMutableSet()
   689→                } else {
   690→                    mutableSetOf()
   691→                }
   692→            } else {
   693→                mutableSetOf()
   694→            }
   695→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   696→            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to load resume state", e)
   697→            mutableSetOf()
   698→        }
   699→    }
   700→
   701→    /**
   702→     * 清理断点状态
   703→     */
   704→    fun clearResumeState(file: File) {
   705→        try {
   706→            val stateFile = File(file.absolutePath + ".resume")
   707→            if (stateFile.exists()) {
   708→                stateFile.delete()
   709→            }
   710→            val tempFile = File(file.absolutePath + ".tmp")
   711→            if (tempFile.exists()) {
   712→                tempFile.delete()
   713→            }
   714→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   715→            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to clear resume state", e)
   716→        }
   717→    }
   718→
   719→    /**
   720→     * 取消下载并清理临时文件
   721→     */
   722→    fun cancelDownload(outputFile: File) {
   723→        clearResumeState(outputFile)
   724→    }
   725→
   726→    /**
   727→     * 根据URL获取对应的Referer
   728→     * B站、YouTube等网站需要正确的Referer才能下载
   729→     */
   730→    private fun getRefererFromUrl(url: String): String {
   731→        return when {
   732→            url.contains("bilibili.com") || url.contains("b23.tv") || url.contains("bilivideo.com") -> "https://www.bilibili.com/"
   733→            url.contains("youtube.com") || url.contains("youtu.be") || url.contains("googlevideo.com") -> "https://www.youtube.com/"
   734→            url.contains("douyin.com") -> "https://www.douyin.com/"
   735→            url.contains("tiktok.com") -> "https://www.tiktok.com/"
   736→            else -> url
   737→        }
   738→    }
   739→
   740→    /**
   741→     * 根据URL获取Origin
   742→     */
   743→    private fun getOriginFromUrl(url: String): String {
   744→        return when {
   745→            url.contains("bilibili.com") || url.contains("b23.tv") || url.contains("bilivideo.com") -> "https://www.bilibili.com"
   746→            url.contains("youtube.com") || url.contains("youtu.be") || url.contains("googlevideo.com") -> "https://www.youtube.com"
   747→            url.contains("douyin.com") -> "https://www.douyin.com"
   748→            url.contains("tiktok.com") -> "https://www.tiktok.com"
   749→            else -> {
   750→                // 从URL中提取origin
   751→                val uri = java.net.URL(url)
   752→                "${uri.protocol}://${uri.host}"
   753→            }
   754→        }
   755→    }
   756→}
